blurb: Season 4 arena gear for Arcane Mage: the Brutal Gladiator's set (Brutal Gladiator's Spellblade…), backed by Guardian's offset pieces from the honor vendor. Season 4 has the strictest gates in TBC: the Brutal weapon requires 1950 rating, shoulders 2200, and several pieces check personal rating as well as team rating. The slot-by-slot list below translates what the current arena ladder's top Arcane Mages equip into their Season 4 equivalents — same slot logic, this season's items.
statPriorityRationale: The honor floor now hands you a full previous-season kit, so resilience is close to solved before you spend an arena point and the ordering only decides which gated piece to chase. Take the 1950-rating Brutal Gladiator's Spellblade over the 2200 amice — the weapon is where spell damage actually lands — and leave Guardian's Silk Footguards and Belt to cover whatever the personal-rating checks lock out.

faq.question: What is the Season 4 arena set for Arcane Mage?
faq.answer: The Brutal Gladiator's pieces: Brutal Gladiator's Spellblade. The 2-piece and 4-piece set bonuses carry over between seasons, so partial upgrades never break your bonus.

faq.question: What are the rating requirements in Season 4?
faq.answer: Season 4 has the strictest gates in TBC: the Brutal weapon requires 1950 rating, shoulders 2200, and several pieces check personal rating as well as team rating.

faq.question: How many arena points does full Season 4 gear cost?
faq.answer: The five set pieces total roughly 8,250 arena points (helm/chest/legs 1,875 each, shoulders 1,500, gloves 1,125) plus about 3,750 for a main weapon. Use the arena points calculator to turn your weekly rating into a purchase timeline.

faq.question: Which honor pieces complement the Season 4 set?
faq.answer: Guardian's Silk Cuffs, Guardian's Silk Belt, Guardian's Silk Footguards — bought with honor and battleground marks, no arena rating needed.
